response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad software development experience and genuine developer tooling contributions — CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), device orchestration tools, and MCP agent tooling — which partially align with the engineering productivity focus. However, the role is fundamentally a people-management position, and there is zero evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading a team through headcount planning or organizational change. Staff Software Engineer titles across his career reflect senior IC scope, not people leadership. Combined with an active career gap since October 2025, he does not meet the minimum bar for this role.
strengths: 15+ years across diverse stacks with clear depth in developer tooling: CI/CD setup, test runners, device orchestration, and MCP/agentic infrastructure
Strong knowledge-sharing track record via workshops, Selenium courses, conference talks, and open-source projects demonstrating technical mentorship instincts
Hands-on system design and architectural breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices environments
concerns: No people management experience whatsoever — the role mandates 2+ years managing engineers, with responsibilities including 1:1s, performance calibration, and headcount decisions
Active career gap since October 2025 with no indication of continued technical engagement relevant to engineering productivity at mobile-platform scale
No mobile-platform engineering productivity experience; iOS exposure was a brief, reactive backfill at a startup rather than platform-level tooling or build systems work
